headline: The University of Toronto and AMD Launch Major AI & Computing R&D Lab, Positioning Canada on Global Innovation Stage
summary: University of Toronto's Department of Computer Science today announced a major research and development (R&D) lab with AMD, a global leader in high-performance computing. The AMD – U of T Research Lab will focus on developing cutting-edge technologies and strengthening Canada as a global hub for innovation excellence.

headline: Why Riot Platforms (RIOT) Is Down 7.3% After Pivoting Power Capacity Into Long-Term AMD AI Deal
summary: Riot Platforms, Inc. reported full-year 2025 results showing record revenue of US$647.44 million and sales of US$576.28 million, alongside a net loss of US$663.18 million and higher Bitcoin production of 5,686 coins versus 2024. At the same time, Riot accelerated its shift toward AI and high-performance computing by acquiring full ownership of its Rockdale site and signing a 10-year, power-intensive data center lease with AMD that began generating revenue in January 2026. We’ll now examine...

headline: Why AMD (AMD) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of computer processor maker AMD (NASDAQ:AMD) fell 3.6% in the afternoon session after escalating geopolitical tensions in the Middle East sparked a surge in oil prices and stoked fears of a wider economic conflict, as Trump warned the conflict could last up to a month.
